title: Enhanced production of recombinant HALT-1 pore-forming toxin using two-step chromatographic procedure
author: Yap, Loo, et al.

steps.title: Two-step purification
steps.instruction: After determining the type of buffer, pH, and salt concentration for the ion-exchange chromatography, we then performed a two-step purification: rHALT-1 was first purified by affinity chromatography and then followed by ion-exchange chromatography. In all the following purification steps, Peristaltic Pump P-1 (Cytiva, USA) was applied to achieve a constant flow of 1.5 mL/min through the column. We prepared both phosphate and acetate buffers for the ion-exchange chromatography, and the details are described below.

steps.title: 5x Native Purification Buffer, pH 8.0 (200 mL)
steps.instruction:
